channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Messi sits out Argentina’s pre-World Cup friendly due to hamstring strain
item.description: Messi's progress depends on his 'clinical and functional progress', Argentina officials say ahead of title defence.

item.title: Iran war day 100: US, Iran trade attacks again, raising tensions
item.description: Tensions rise as US shoots down Iranian drones over Strait of Hormuz, vital for international maritime traffic.

item.title: Teenager Antonelli snatches Monaco pole with ‘magic lap’ for Mercedes
item.description: F1 championship leader becomes the first Italian since Jarno Trulli in 2004 to take pole position in the principality.

item.title: Outrage over Palestinian ‘dog rape’ joke at Tribeca Film Festival
item.description: A US influencer and actor have caused outrage after mocking Palestinians subject to rape in Israeli prisons.

item.title: Why are players being issued visas just days before the World Cup?
item.description: Last-minute visas are being issued for players competing in the FIFA World Cup. Al Jazeera's Mohammad Saleh explains.

item.title: By the numbers: 100 days of the US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: From the human cost to the economy, Al Jazeera visualises how the US-Israel war on Iran has unfolded since February 28.

item.title: How many times were the US and Iran on the verge of a deal?
item.description: One hundred days into the US-Israel war on Iran, we look at the number of times a deal seemed close.

item.title: Why is Chinese President Xi Jinping visiting North Korea now?
item.description: The Chinese leader is making his first trip to Pyongyang in seven years amid significant military developments.

item.title: Kenyan graduates turn to AI tools for farming as jobs dry up
item.description: Young farmers are combining traditional agriculture with mobile apps to build livelihoods in the absence of formal jobs.

item.title: Protests grow in Albania against Trump-Kushner-linked resort
item.description: Thousands of protesters have rallied in the Albanian capital against a proposed luxury beach resort linked to Trump.

item.title: Iran war live: US forces shoot down Iranian drones in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Israeli forces kill three high-ranking Lebanese soldiers as Arab nations condemn Iran's attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait.

item.title: Trump pardons former US Congress member accused of insider trading
item.description: Republican Stephen Buyer was convicted and sentenced to 22 months in prison, though he has maintained his innocence.

item.title: Pentagon said to raise threat level on Israel spying to ‘critical’
item.description: Department reports raise concerns about increased espionage activity amid US-Israeli war with Iran, ceasefire talks.

item.title: Tunisians protest for press freedom and release of political prisoners
item.description: Tunisians protest for press freedom and release of political prisoners.

item.title: Cuba’s Raul Castro makes first public appearance since US charges
item.description: Former Cuban president Raul Castro made his first public appearance in Havana since being indicted by the United States

item.title: Rights group says drone strike kills 11 in central Sudan market
item.description: Emergency Lawyers said dozens were also wounded in the strike that came less than 24 hours after similar drone attacks.

item.title: US doctor recovers from Ebola in Germany as DRC cases surge to 488
item.description: Berlin's Charite hospital hailed treatment as a 'significant therapeutic success' as outbreak spreads in DR Congo.

item.title: Video shows Israeli soldier and settlers assaulting two Palestinians
item.description: A surveillance camera caught a brutal assault by an Israeli soldier and settlers on two men in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Palestinian father buries baby killed by Israeli gunfire in West Bank
item.description: A Palestinian father in Hebron has buried his seven-month-old son after the baby was killed by Israeli gunfire

item.title: Israeli attack on Gaza City tent camp kills several Palestinians
item.description: Israeli attack on Gaza City tent camp kills several Palestinians.

item.title: From first lady to president? Inside the rise of Peru’s Keiko Fujimori
item.description: In her fourth bid to be president, Fujimori faces her best odds yet. But can she overcome scandal and her father's past?

item.title: ‘Unacceptable situation’: Minister cries foul as Jamaica suffers blackout
item.description: Minister Daryl Vaz reassures residents that power had been restored across Jamaica after a rare islandwide outage.

item.title: Why are Armenia’s elections being so keenly watched abroad?
item.description: Russia, the United States and European Union all have interests as geopolitics take centre-stage.

item.title: 100 days into the war on Iran, Trump fails to rally US support
item.description: Unpopularity of the war may affect the US approach to the conflict and hurt Republicans in the elections, analysts say.

item.title: Which sub-Saharan Africa sides have best World Cup chance? Senegal, Ghana?
item.description: After Morocco became the first Africans to reach a World Cup semifinal in 2022, can a sub-Saharan side step up in 2026?
